authority_layers.name: Direct intervention authority
authority_layers.definition: capacity to modify a path, suspend closure, or restore editability through operative action

authority_layers.name: Diagnostic authority
authority_layers.definition: capacity to identify, disclose, record, or amplify recognized closure

authority_layers.name: Interpretive awareness
authority_layers.definition: recognition of closure without effective means to modify, disclose, or escalate

authority_layers.name: No authority
authority_layers.definition: absence of recognized influence and operative capacity

rule: Do not collapse authority layers into a single responsibility category.
